activated_manager_patterns.description: Regragui's Morocco maintain elite low-block compactness, suppressing opponent shot quality.
When the block holds, Morocco unleash quick counters through wide channels.

activated_chains.name: Possession → Corners
activated_chains.explanation_snippet: When a possession-control team faces a compact block, wide play generates corners. Expect elevated corner volume.

activated_chains.name: Low Block Deflections → Corners
activated_chains.explanation_snippet: Low blocks absorb shots and deflect them behind — this mechanically inflates the corner count.

activated_chains.name: Low Block Stalemate
activated_chains.explanation_snippet: When defensive compactness dominates both ends, the match tends toward low goal volume and drawn outcomes.

supporting_context: Possession side will dominate territory and corners.
Low block suppresses central penetration and goal volume.
Expect elevated corner count and lower total goals.
Walid Regragui (Morocco) activates pattern: low block discipline (confidence 86%).
Walid Regragui (Morocco) activates pattern: counter trigger (confidence 74%).
counter_context: If the block breaks early, the script reverses rapidly.
Possession dominance does not guarantee goals — conversion rate is the key variable.
knowledge_headline: Brazil's possession-control identity meets Morocco's tournament-survival approach — Tactical Neutralization script likely.
knowledge_body: Brazil are profiled as a possession-control side, while Morocco operate as a tournament-survival team. That interaction most commonly produces the Tactical Neutralization script (estimated probability 35%). When a possession-control team faces a compact block, wide play generates corners. Expect elevated corner volume. Low blocks absorb shots and deflect them behind — this mechanically inflates the corner count. Regragui's Morocco maintain elite low-block compactness, suppressing opponent shot quality. Possession side will dominate territory and corners.
knowledge_key_risk: If the block breaks early, the script reverses rapidly.
